hero.headline: Automate business processes with confidence
hero.subheadline: From a simple workflow to managing AI automation systems across your entire business, Axiom helps you design, deploy, and optimize every step.
hero.platformHeadline: One workspace for automations, agents, and growth systems
hero.platformText: Map your workflows, connect your stack, and let AI agents handle repetitive operations while your team focuses on decisions that matter.

secondSection.headline: Automate business processes with confidence
secondSection.subheadline: From a simple workflow, to managing AI automation systems across your entire business, make it happen with Axiom.

cards.title: Build and ship fast, be first
cards.description: Whatever you want to automate, Axiom gets you moving. Visually design solutions without code to save time.

cards.title: Solve smarter, boost efficiency
cards.description: When complexity grows, Axiom lets you customize automations and plug in AI apps for better, faster results.

cards.title: Orchestrate with clarity and control
cards.description: As you think bigger, create autonomous AI agents and manage everything with a real-time visual map.

services.name: Explosive Growth
services.problem: Your next content push needs more reach, more consistency, and less manual coordination.
services.solution: Launch a complete AI-assisted content workflow with influencer posts, Reddit distribution, and performance tracking.
services.roi: Perfect for your next campaign: leave it to us and enjoy the results.

integrationsShowcase.headline: 3,000+ pre-built apps. Limitless integration.
integrationsShowcase.subheadline: Quickly adapt to new market demands by connecting your entire tech stack. Use our library of pre-built apps for instant workflows, and our flexible platform to integrate any custom system.

solutionsSection.headline: Adapt at speed with visual-first automation and AI
solutionsSection.subheadline: Axiom drives efficiencies, solves problems, and speeds innovation by breaking down silos across your business.

tabs.label: IT
tabs.title: IT automation
tabs.description: Cut complexity and move faster by automating everything from monitoring to incident response. Connect tools, integrate AI, reduce manual work, and free your team to focus on innovation.

tabs.label: Operations
tabs.title: Operations automation
tabs.description: Build connected workflows for approvals, reporting, handoffs, and fulfillment so work moves without waiting on manual updates.

tabs.label: Marketing
tabs.title: Marketing automation
tabs.description: Turn campaign ideas into repeatable systems for content planning, distribution, lead capture, enrichment, and performance reporting.

tabs.label: Sales
tabs.title: Sales automation
tabs.description: Qualify leads, sync CRM data, trigger follow-ups, and give your reps the context they need before every conversation.

tabs.label: Finance
tabs.title: Finance automation
tabs.description: Automate invoices, reconciliations, approvals, and reporting with controlled workflows that keep every stakeholder aligned.

tabs.label: CX
tabs.title: Customer experience automation
tabs.description: Resolve common requests, route escalations, and keep customers updated with AI workflows that feel fast and consistent.

tabs.label: People
tabs.title: People automation
tabs.description: Streamline onboarding, policy answers, employee requests, and people operations with secure AI assistants.

successStories.headline: Automation success stories
successStories.subheadline: Go beyond the hype and see how leading companies are achieving real results with AI and automation. Discover practical insights and proven strategies to transform your own business.
